name: BEU Primary Button
description: Main call-to-action button. Red fill, white text, 16px radius. Used for rally and petition CTAs.

name: BEU Secondary Button
description: Outlined secondary button. Red border, white fill, red text. Used for secondary actions.

name: BEU Site Header
description: Website header component with BEU logo, nav links, and member login button.

name: BEU Site Footer
description: Website footer with contact info, social links, and BPS legal disclaimer.

name: BEU Event Card
description: Card component for displaying upcoming BEU events with date, time, and RSVP button.

name: DBQ Organizer Frame
description: Complete DBQ graphic organizer with HAPP analysis columns and thesis writing section.

name: SAQ Response Frame
description: SAQ answer frame with three-part response box aligned to AP rubric.

name: BEU Social Banner - Square
description: 1080x1080 Instagram post template for BEU contract campaign updates.

name: BEU Alert Box
description: Yellow callout box for important announcements. Used in newsletters and slide decks.

name: Eastbridge History Club Logo
description: Primary logo mark for Eastbridge History Club. Available in color, grayscale, and reversed variants.

name: APUSH Period Timeline Banner
description: Horizontal timeline spanning all 9 APUSH periods with color-coded era markers.

name: BEU Wage Comparison Table
description: Table component comparing BPS teacher wages to neighboring districts.

name: BEU Petition Counter Badge
description: Dynamic counter badge showing number of petition signatures collected.

name: Primary Source Annotation Box
description: Annotation overlay for primary source images with citation and analysis fields.

name: BEU Newsletter Pull Quote
description: Large pull quote component for newsletter member spotlights and testimonials.

name: BEU Contract Issue Tag
description: Pill-shaped tag for labeling contract issues: wages, class size, PD, benefits.

name: BEU Contract Rights Icon Set
description: 16 icons representing BEU contract rights: grievance, sick days, class size, etc.

name: AP Exam Rubric Callout
description: Color-coded rubric callout showing AP exam scoring criteria for DBQ, LEQ, and SAQ.

name: BEU Campaign Progress Bar
description: Progress bar showing campaign milestones: petition, action, negotiations, ratification.

name: BEU Mobile Nav Menu
description: Mobile navigation menu for BEU Eastbridge website. Hamburger trigger, full-screen overlay.
